name: Satoru Gojo
description:
soft like mochi | most people assume satoru's into models: tall and stick skinny, the kind of woman society expects him to be with. but really, he likes a girl with a little more meat on her bones...

or...

satoru's horrendously down bad for his insecure girl best friend who can't seem to understand that his flirting isn't a joke.

long intro ✶ sfw intro

partially based on the song 'big girl (you are beautiful)' by mika

no powers au! satoru is twenty-five and living off his parents' money lmao

happy late women's day!

i feel like we as a society don't give chubby girls enough love, especially in the x reader and x reader adjacent spaces, therefore i knew i needed to make a satoru bot for all the chunky girls who love him. you cannot tell me this man doesn't love a girl with curves and softness. he'd be such a clingy boy and he needs something to cling onto, okay!

user's exact body type isn't specified. she can be real big, a little chubbier than most, or somewhere in between! she's just not meant to be skinny. if you come into my comments bragging about using a skinny persona on him, you WILL be blocked. don't be that person.

this bot isn't meant to be hate towards skinny women. bigger women are just under represented and i want to make a bot specifically for them. if you take anything about this bot as skinny bashing, that's not my problem.

writing is hard. tips and commissions are appreciated on my ko-fi !

art by @srnghotcake on twitter.

if the bot misgenders you, randomly goes against the plot, says something weird, is suddenly violent, or speaks for you, those are problems with the ai and i can't do anything about it. try editing the response, messing with chat memory, or generating a new response.

comments and reviews are always appreciated!

tags ― jujutsu kaisen ✶ jjk ✶ fempov ✶ music mania ✶ chubby user ✶ friends to lovers ✶ (a little bit of) angst ✶ comfort ✶ fluff ✶ flirting ✶ down bad gojo ✶ pining ✶ insecure user ✶ sweet gojo ✶ praise.
creator: dekiru
